Description:
Driven data enthusiast with a strong foundation in Data Science, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning,
complemented by hands-on experience in feature engineering, data extraction, and data preprocessing. Proficient
in C, C++, Python, JS and SQL, with a solid grasp of building and optimizing data driven solutions. Experienced in
developing projects across domains, including cloud-based systems and intelligent applications, with working
knowledge of full-stack development to support end-to-end solution building.
Technical Skills:
* Languages: C, C++, Python, JavaScript
* Web Development: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI.
* Data Science & AI: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Computer Vision (Open
CV), Time Series Analysis, EDA
* Libraries

ata Science & AI: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Computer Vision (Open
CV), Time Series Analysis, EDA
* Libraries & Frameworks: Tensorflow, Keras, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy.
* Databases, Cloud & DevOps: PostgreSQL, MySQL, AWS, Docker.
* Core Subjects: Object-Oriented Programming (OOPs),DBMS, OS.
Non-Technical Skills:
Leadership, Communication skills, Problem solving skills, Team management, Adaptability & Learning Agility.

PROJECTS
• FinAI - Stock Analysing Chatbot [github] [Deployment]:
◦ Description:
* Architected a stateful Multi-Agent System (MAS) using LangGraph and Groq (Llama-3.3-70b) to build a production-grade,
ultra-low latency investment research platform.
* Engineered an intent-driven orchestrator that dynamically routes queries across 5 specialized execution pipelines (Vision,
Fundamental, Portfolio, etc.) to optimize compute and response times.
* Designed strict anti-hallucination guardrails, integrating an adversarial AI debate panel to penalize sycophancy, and a
determi

and response times.
* Designed strict anti-hallucination guardrails, integrating an adversarial AI debate panel to penalize sycophancy, and a
deterministic Pandas and NumPy sandbox to compute portfolio risk metrics without relying on LLM arithmetic.
◦ Tech Stack: Python, LangChain, LangGraph, Streamlit

-- 1 of 2 --

• StarRoute – Distributed Space Travel Platform [github]:
◦ Description:
* Developed a full-stack distributed booking platform scaling a C++ OOP model into a highly concurrent web application to
solve the Thundering Herd problem during high-traffic ticket sales.
* Engineered a high-performance C++ REST API using the Drogon framework and PostgreSQL, applying OOP principles
(Polymorphism, Singleton) for role-based passenger management and encapsulated ticket pricing.
* Architec

work and PostgreSQL, applying OOP principles
(Polymorphism, Singleton) for role-based passenger management and encapsulated ticket pricing.
* Architected an asynchronous booking engine utilizing Redis distributed locks (SETNX) to prevent seat double-booking and
RabbitMQ message queues for non-blocking background transaction processing.
* Built a responsive React SPA with Vite, featuring custom interactive space-themed seat maps, dynamic state hydration, and
asynchronous polling for real-time boarding pass generation.
◦ Tech Stack: C++, Drogon, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, React.js, Vite
• LoclyAI – Smart Civic Issue Reporting Platform [github] [Deployment]:
◦ Description:
* Engineered an automated computer vision pipeline utilizing a YOLOv8 model to accurately detect, localize, and categor

] [Deployment]:
◦ Description:
* Engineered an automated computer vision pipeline utilizing a YOLOv8 model to accurately detect, localize, and categorize
user-reported civic anomalies (e.g., potholes, garbage accumulation, broken traffic signals).
* Architected a decoupled microservices inference system, using Node.js/Express.js as an API gateway to manage client
requests and automated geo-tagging, seamlessly routing data to a high-performance FastAPI (Python) server for low-latency
ML predictions.
* Developed a responsive frontend interface using React.js to streamline the civic reporting workflow, allowing users to
upload image evidence, visualize mapped anomalies, and track resolution statuses in real-time.
◦ Tech Stack: Python, FastAPI, YOLOv8 (Computer Vision), React.js, Node.js, Expr

sualize mapped anomalies, and track resolution statuses in real-time.
◦ Tech Stack: Python, FastAPI, YOLOv8 (Computer Vision), React.js, Node.js, Express.js,PostgreSQL, REST APIs

upload image evidence, visualize mapped anomalies, and track resolution statuses in real-time.
